summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Naked Lure e-commerce app. All 12 backend pytest tests pass (100%). Frontend core flows (Home, Shop + filter, cart add/qty/remove, Checkout UI, Contact submit, Admin CRUD, mobile) all function correctly. No critical issues found.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description/aria-describedby on DialogContent - accessibility nit only

action_items: (Optional) Add SheetDescription or aria-describedby to CartDrawer SheetContent to silence Radix a11y warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py exposes POST /api/seed publicly - should be protected/removed in production to prevent accidental data wipe.
Admin page has no auth gate (confirmed as intentional MVP scope).
CartContext: localStorage access in useState initializer will fail in SSR (not used here, so fine).
Order model persists payment_method as free string; OK for mock, but consider enum validation for future.
No rate limiting on /api/contact - spam risk.
test_credentials: None required - no auth in app
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 4 products on startup via _ensure_seed(); verified present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py run against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Correct frontend testids: checkout fields use ship-name/ship-email/ship-address/ship-city/ship-state/ship-zip/ship-country and card-number/card-name/card-expiry/card-cvv (note CVV not CVC). Cart qty uses cart-increment-{id}-{size} and cart-decrement-{id}-{size}. Contact fields use contact-name-input, contact-email-input, contact-subject-input, contact-message-input. Admin CRUD verified end-to-end (rows grew 4->5 after adding TEST_UI_Prod). Order flow not fully e2e in UI due to my testid typo but backend POST /api/orders validated with free-shipping, tax 8%, small/large subtotals, and empty cart 400.
verified_features: GET /api/products returns 4 seeded with all required fields
POST /api/orders: shipping 7.99 under $75, 0 over $75, tax 8%, order_number NL-prefix
Home: hero, featured (4 cards), lifestyle, categories sections render
Shop: grid renders 4 cards, filter-fishing-shirts button updates URL param to ?category=Fishing+Shirts and filters grid to 1 item
Add-to-cart opens drawer; cart count badge updates
Cart drawer: qty increment updates subtotal ($34.99 -> $69.98); remove button exists; subtotal shown
Contact form submits, toast 'Message sent!' appears, fields reset
Admin: table lists products, New Product modal opens, save creates row (4 -> 5)
